rationale: Keep this pair because the cited paper is not just topically adjacent: it develops decision-framing (choosing vs. rejecting) effects on option choice, reference price perceptions, and loss-aversion-related outcomes, which closely aligns with the citing paper’s core mechanisms (reference-dependent trade-offs, loss aversion, and choice framing in option/brand selection).
